privileged_info_summary: The add_employee_tag task uses Odoo 17 Community Edition running at http://localhost:8069 with admin/admin credentials. The employee 'Jennie Fletcher' is a real demo employee from Odoo's official HR demo data (employee_15 in hr_demo.xml), working as an Experienced Developer in R&D. The 'Trainer' tag (employee_category_3) also comes from Odoo's official demo data. However, the task description incorrectly states to 'go to the HR Settings tab' to add the tag—in reality, the Tags field (category_ids) is located in the main card area ABOVE the tabs in the form view, not inside the HR Settings tab. All other facts are verified: the Odoo version is 17, the login credentials are correct, the employee and tag both exist in the official demo data.
